text.title: PH Launch Day Runbook Core Rules
text.summary: 5+ testable rules every PH Launch Day Runbook application MUST enforce, plus a skip-this-methodology fallback. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: PH launches reset at 00:01 PT — anchor every step in the runbook to PT and convert to local; missing the PT reset by even 30 minutes shifts you out of the morning hunter wave and is a launch-killer.
rule.rationale: Carries forward from v1 source; preserve until revised in next pass.

rule.statement: Pre-stage two artifacts the night before: a maker's comment (≤280 chars, includes "I'll be here all day answering questions") and a 30-second product video pinned to the listing — listings without both fall ≥30% in attention on average.
rule.rationale: Carries forward from v1 source; preserve until revised in next pass.

rule.statement: Triage incoming comments into 4 classes within 10 minutes of receipt: (a) ASK = product/use-case question → reply with concrete answer + CTA, (b) PRAISE = thank + add a use-case nudge, (c) CRITIQUE = thank + acknowledge + name your next iteration, (d) SPAM = ignore; comments older than 10 minutes drop in algo weight.
rule.rationale: Carries forward from v1 source; preserve until revised in next pass.

rule.statement: Reply with a unique sentence on every comment — never copy/paste; PH downranks visibly templated replies, and the comment thread is your sales surface for 14 hours.
rule.rationale: Carries forward from v1 source; preserve until revised in next pass.

rule.statement: Drive every comment toward one ask: signup, demo booking, or DM; threads without a CTA convert ≤1%, threads with a single clear CTA convert 6-12% per typical indie launch.
rule.rationale: Carries forward from v1 source; preserve until revised in next pass.

rule.statement: Schedule three energy refuels at +6h, +10h, +14h: 20-minute breaks with food, water, and no screens; founders who skip these crash at hour 12 and miss the EU evening wave.
rule.rationale: Carries forward from v1 source; preserve until revised in next pass.

rule.statement: Log every signup, demo, and meaningful conversation in a launch-day sheet with timestamp and source comment; this is the input for the post-launch drip and the launch retrospective — without the log, the launch is unmeasurable.
rule.rationale: Carries forward from v1 source; preserve until revised in next pass.

rule.statement: If any Applies-If precondition fails OR any Skip-If condition triggers, do NOT apply this methodology. Emit a skip-record naming the failed precondition / triggered skip, and route the task to the correct methodology (or none).
rule.rationale: Methodology hygiene: mis-application produces worse artefacts than no methodology because downstream consumers trust the schema; the skip-record makes non-application traceable.
